info.name: Microsoft Azure ServiceFabricManagementClient
info.description: Azure Service Fabric Resource Provider API Client

item.name: Microsoft Azure Restarts One Or More Nodes On The Node Type

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

variable.description: (Required) The customer subscription identifier.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the cluster resource.
(Required) The name of the node type.

request.description: Restarts one or more nodes on the node type. It will disable the fabric nodes, trigger a restart on the VMs and activate the nodes back again.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

response.name: The request was accepted and the operation will complete asynchronously.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

description.content: The URL to get the status of an ongoing long-running operation.
The URL to get the status of a completed long-running operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Reimages One Or More Nodes On The Node Type

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Deletes One Or More Nodes On The Node Type

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

variable.description: (Required) The customer subscription identifier.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the cluster resource.
(Required) The name of the node type.

request.description: Deletes one or more nodes on the node type. It will disable the fabric nodes, trigger a delete on the VMs and removes the state from the cluster.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

response.name: The request was accepted and the operation will complete asynchronously.

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.

description.content: The URL to get the status of an ongoing long-running operation.
The URL to get the status of a completed long-running operation.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the Service Fabric resource provider API. This is a required parameter and it's value must be "2024-02-01-preview" for this specification.
